Hi [First Name],

Our final introduction — and this one comes with a service announcement.

Linda has joined Luxon Brown as our Retirement Plan Specialist, leading our new retirement plan services department. She works directly with business owners to design, manage, and optimize 401(k) plans for their teams. With 19 years of experience in the retirement plan industry, Linda brings deep expertise in the tax advantages and savings opportunities that employers and employees can leverage. If you own a business and have questions about your company's retirement plan, Linda is your person.
 

Welcome to the team, Linda. 🎉
 

Warm regards,

The Luxon Brown Team
